channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Simple water trick reduces diesel engine pollution by over 60%
item.description: A simple fuel modification could significantly cut diesel engine pollution, according to a review of global studies.

item.title: Scientists recreate dinosaur nest to solve 70-million-year-old mystery
item.description: Researchers built a life-size oviraptor nest to study how these bird-like dinosaurs incubated their eggs millions of years ago.

item.title: Surprising brain discovery challenges long-held views on movement disorders
item.description: A new finding overturns a key assumption about the brain's movement center, revealing unexpected interactions between two cerebellar cells.

item.title: Modern neuroscience revives a 130-year-old idea from Freud
item.description: A new paper suggests that Sigmund Freud's early theories align with today's leading neuroscience framework, offering fresh insights.
